title: Tormento d'amore
director: Leonardo Bercovici, Claudio Gora, Eduardo Manzanos
writer: Juan Antonio Bardem, Leonardo Bercovici, Claudio Gora
actors: Märta Torén, Massimo Serato, Otello Toso
plot: Sara and Pietro meet in Barcelona and immediately a strong friendship grows between them, that soon turns into love. Sara does not dare to tell Pietro about a recent affair with a man called Roberto.
